summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GERdoctor German medical licensing onboarding app. Backend APIs fully functional with all 8 German steps, 3 tagged partners, and proper authentication. Frontend shows German content and user dashboard, but has some session management issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Intermittent session timeout causing redirects to login page

integration_issues.issue: Some admin login attempts fail to reach dashboard

passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@example.com / Admin123!)
Demo user login with correct credentials (demo@example.com / Demo123!)
Partner login with correct credentials (partner@example.com / Partner123!)

Admin steps endpoint returns 8 German steps (Persönliche Daten, Service Antragstellung, Meilenstein Antragstellung, FaMed, Service Kenntnisprüfung, Meilenstein Kenntnisprüfung, Service Weiterbildung, Meilenstein Job finden)
Admin partners endpoint returns 3 partners (ILS, ILS2, ILS3) with correct tags
Partner tag filtering: GET /api/partners?tag=Antragstellung returns only ILS partner
Partner tag filtering: GET /api/partners?tag=Kenntnisprüfung returns only ILS2 partner
User steps endpoint returns 8 steps with correct types and filter_tags
Landing page shows German CMS content (GERdoctor - Praktizieren in Deutschland)
Fresh registration creates user with 8 pending progress entries
Demo user dashboard shows step 1 'Persönliche Daten' with form fields (Name, Vorname, Telefon, Adresse)
Fachgebiet selectbox has 3 options: Allgemeinmedizin, Zahnmedizin, HNO
Dokumente multiupload field with '+ Dokument hinzufügen' button present
German step navigation visible in user interface
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend session management issues causing intermittent redirects to login page. Investigate admin dashboard authentication stability.

success_percentage.frontend: 85% - Core functionality works but has session management issues
